title: Pack Presets
description: A mod to save selected resource packs as a preset for easy swapping ability!
body:
# Pack Presets
Pack Presets is a mod for everyone who like myself uses lots of resourcepacks, especially if you use different resourcepacks for different servers and scenarios!

The mod adds 2 new buttons to the resourcepack menu, "Add Preset", a button to the right of selected resource packs that when pressed will open a menu to create a new preset of all the currently selected packs and "Presets", a button that opens a menu with all created presets where you can select and load a preset!
